testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from satisfied customers
testimonials.items.0.author: James W.
testimonials.items.0.text: Responded within the hour and had our system fixed the same day. Professional, clean, and fairly priced. Highly recommend!
testimonials.items.1.author: Sarah M.
testimonials.items.1.text: We've used them for both our home and business. Always on time, excellent work quality, and they clean up after themselves.
testimonials.items.2.author: Robert K.
testimonials.items.2.text: The maintenance plan has saved us thousands in potential repairs. Great value and their team is always courteous and knowledgeable.
about.title: About Us
about.story.title: Built on Craftsmanship
about.story.content: With over 15 years of hands-on experience, we've built our reputation on quality workmanship, honest pricing, and reliable service. What started as a one-person operation has grown into a trusted team of licensed professionals serving residential and commercial clients across the region. We treat every job — big or small — with the same level of care and attention to detail.
about.commitment.title: Our Guarantee
about.commitment.content: Every job is backed by our workmanship guarantee. If something isn't right, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. We're fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.
